category_sources: Official HEVEA homepage and manual describe it as a LaTeX to HTML translator.
source_facts.description says it is a LaTeX-to-HTML translator.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and manual stylize the project as HEVEA.
docs_sources: Official README in the repository lists online documentation at hevea.inria.fr/doc/.
Official homepage has a Documentation section linking to the online manual at /doc/.
repo_sources: Official HEVEA homepage has a Development section linking to HEVEA on GitHub.
The linked official repository is maranget/hevea and its README identifies the HEVEA source distribution.
tags_sources: Official homepage says HEVEA is written in Objective Caml and outputs modern HTML.
